knowledge.title: Mirage T-side: Mid control for ADR boost
knowledge.description: Pro teams average 15% higher ADR by taking mid control in first 30 seconds. Use connector smoke, window flash, and top mid molly to secure control. This creates space for A/B splits and isolates CT rotations.
knowledge.situation: T-side, low ADR, need map control
knowledge.pro_example: Team Liquid vs NAVI - IEM Katowice 2024 (avg 92 ADR with mid control)

knowledge.title: Dust2 A Long: Crossfire positioning
knowledge.description: CT setup: One player pit, one player site. Pit player holds long doors, site player trades from car/default. Avoid both players being on site - creates easy multi-frags for T's.
knowledge.pro_example: FaZe Clan defensive setups - 78% A hold rate

knowledge.title: Economy: Force buy after pistol loss
knowledge.description: If you lose pistol + anti-eco (0-2), force buy round 3 with SMGs/armor. Goal: Deal $2000+ utility damage to delay T execute. Even if you lose, you reset their economy and get better guns round 4.
knowledge.situation: Lost first two rounds, economy decision
knowledge.pro_example: G2 Esports economy playbook - 65% round 3 force success rate

knowledge.title: Utility: Mirage A execute standard
knowledge.description: Smoke CT, smoke jungle, molly stairs, flash stairs x2. Execute at 1:15 remaining. CT smoke cuts rotations, jungle smoke isolates site, molly clears default. Coordinate flashes for entry fraggers.
knowledge.situation: T-side A execute, need site entry
knowledge.pro_example: Vitality A execute - 72% plant rate with full utility

knowledge.title: Aim: Crosshair placement on angles
knowledge.description: Keep crosshair at head level, pre-aimed at common angles. On Mirage mid, pre-aim window, then connector, then top mid. Reduce reaction time by 200ms with proper pre-aim. Practice in deathmatch.
knowledge.pro_example: s1mple crosshair placement analysis - 68% HS rate

knowledge.title: Inferno: Banana control importance
knowledge.description: T-side: Take banana control early (first 45s). Use car smoke, CT smoke, and sandbags molly. Banana control gives B split option and forces CT utility dump. Denying banana control loses 30% of round win rate.
knowledge.situation: T-side map control, low round win rate
knowledge.pro_example: Astralis banana control - 85% B execute success with control

knowledge.title: Retake: Trade kills over survival
knowledge.description: In retakes, prioritize trading your teammate's death over staying alive. 2v2 retake with trade = 50% win rate. 1v2 retake after no trade = 15% win rate. Use utility to create trade opportunities.
knowledge.situation: CT retake scenarios, low clutch rate
knowledge.pro_example: NiKo retake fundamentals - 78% trade rate in retakes

knowledge.title: Overpass: B site utility setup
knowledge.description: CT setup: Molly barrels at round start (delays T push 15s). One player heaven, one player site. Heaven player throws pillar smoke on execute. Site player holds close angles with flashbang support.
knowledge.pro_example: ENCE B site defense - 68% hold rate with molly delay

knowledge.title: Pistol round: Armor vs utility decision
knowledge.description: T-side pistol: Buy armor if playing aggressive (mid rush, A rush). Buy utility if playing default (smokes/flashes for late execute). Armor increases duel win rate by 25%, utility increases plant rate by 30%.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: 60% armor buys on aggressive maps (Dust2, Mirage)

knowledge.title: Ancient: Mid control with AWP
knowledge.description: CT AWP mid: Hold from donut or elbow. Deny T mid control to prevent A/B information. If T's smoke mid, fall back to site and hold retake angles. AWP mid control increases round win rate by 18%.
knowledge.pro_example: ZywOo Ancient AWP - 2.1 kills per round from mid

knowledge.title: Communication: Damage callouts
knowledge.description: Always call damage dealt ('85 in 2' means 85 damage, hit 2 times). Helps teammates know if enemy is low HP for aggressive plays. Include location and weapon if possible ('85 in 2, long, AK').
knowledge.pro_example: IGL best practice - damage callouts increase team frag rate by 12%

knowledge.title: Nuke: Ramp control for outside access
knowledge.description: T-side: Take ramp control early to enable outside pushes. Use ramp smoke, red smoke, and lobby flash. Ramp control opens 3 site hit options (A, B, outside). Without ramp, forced into predictable A main hits.
knowledge.pro_example: Heroic Nuke T-side - 70% round win with ramp control

knowledge.title: Vertigo: Mid control for information
knowledge.description: CT-side: One player mid (stairs or ramp) for early info. Mid player calls T movement (A or B) then rotates. Mid control gives 10-15s rotation advantage. If T's take mid, fall back and retake with utility.
knowledge.pro_example: Vitality Vertigo CT - 82% correct rotation prediction with mid info

knowledge.title: Aim: Spray control practice
knowledge.description: Practice first 10 bullets of AK/M4 spray pattern daily. 90% of spray kills happen in first 10 bullets. Focus on pulling down + slight left compensation. Use workshop maps: Recoil Master, Aim Botz.
knowledge.situation: Low spray accuracy, losing medium-range duels
knowledge.pro_example: NiKo spray control - 85% accuracy in first 10 bullets

knowledge.title: Anubis: A main default setup
knowledge.description: CT setup: One player heaven (holds main), one player site (holds connector). Heaven player uses one-way smoke for advantageous angle. Site player holds close with molly for default plant denial.
knowledge.pro_example: FaZe Anubis A defense - 74% hold rate with heaven one-way
